description: Free-source field mapping for v112T one-shot plan. Maps candidate free API source fields to normalized radar fields, then to v112Q stricter threshold fields. No API keys required; endpoints are recorded as planned strings only — no live requests are made.

primary.rate_limit_known: ~10-30 req/min (free tier, undocumented; varies by load)
primary.note: Endpoints are recorded as planned API path strings only. No actual HTTP request is made by v112T.

fallback.note: Fallback source. CoinCap has looser rate limits but less asset coverage and slightly different price feeds.

forbidden_sources.reason: Requires API key (even free tier needs registration)
Out of scope for free-source plan
Requires persistent connection (daemon); out of scope for one-shot

field_mapping.description: Maps raw source fields → normalized v112T fields → v112Q threshold fields. Normalized fields feed into the LiveSourceResponse schema.

coingecko_to_normalized.note: CoinGecko /simple/price returns flat object per asset; /coins/markets returns array of asset objects. Both are mapped to the same normalized fields.

coincap_to_normalized.note: CoinCap /v2/assets returns flat array with different field names. price_change_pct_1h is NOT available from CoinCap — this field will be null when CoinCap is the source.

normalized_to_v112q_threshold.price_usd: v112Q min_per_asset_abs_price_change_pct check uses this as baseline
normalized_to_v112q_threshold.open_interest_change_pct: v112Q secondary metric option 2 (NOT available from CoinGecko/CoinCap free; will be null. v112Q require_price_and_one_secondary_metric may fail without this)
normalized_to_v112q_threshold.note: OI data is the main gap for free sources. v112Q require_price_and_one_secondary_metric = true means volume must be present for all assets, or the signal is DEGRADE_TO_MOCK.

coincap_missing: volume_change_pct (CoinCap provides raw volume, not % change — must be computed from previous pull or marked as unavailable)
both_missing: open_interest_change_pct (neither free source provides OI; this field is always null from free REST)
source_field_gaps.impact_on_v112q: Without OI data, v112Q secondary metric check only has volume_change_pct available. If volume data is also missing, the signal cannot meet require_price_and_one_secondary_metric and must DEGRADE_TO_MOCK.

multi_source_consistency.description: When both CoinGecko and CoinCap return data for the same asset, cross-validate prices.
multi_source_consistency.note: Cross-source validation requires both sources to return data for the same asset. If only one source returns data, the check is skipped and the result is DEGRADE_TO_MOCK (multi-source consistency uncertain).
